merge_note: Curated digest for the v0.3 release decision. Three columns (qwen2.5-1.5b base, qwen2.5-7b reference, kubelm-edge-v0 + corrected prompt) come from bench c68fe996; the kubelm-edge-v0.3 column comes from re-run d71c61d1 after the -c 16384 ctx fix (the original c68fe996 v0.3 column had 10/35 runs error with 'request exceeds context size (8192 tokens)'). Same scenarios, same K8sGPT version, same MCP protocol, same DEFAULT_SYSTEM_PROMPT, fresh-cluster strategy.
